channel.title: Privacy on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Privacy on Lucky Taorem | Tech & AI Blog

item.title: ACLU Toolkit Exposes Hidden Police Surveillance Tech Use
item.description: The ACLU of Massachusetts launched a free toolkit for defense attorneys to uncover secret police surveillance tech like Flock, Shot Spotter, and AI reports.

item.title: MidtermElection Data Security Crisis
item.description: A lax DHS database endangers millions of voters, sparking privacy alarms as the 2026 midterms near, risking disenfranchisement and intimidation.
